languages.text: "Мы... Позволили скверне прорости средь жителей Гордости Сантиэля..." {n}Юноша ежится и, несмотря на то, что лицо его скрывает маска — отводит взгляд.{/n} "Она охватила наших братьев и сестер, затуманила их разум, исказила истинную веру в Бога-Императора... За что он и покарал наш мир — забрал Огненную Посланницу и обрек неверных Ему на смерть в ледяных объятиях мрака..."

traits.locale_text: "Мы... Позволили скверне прорости средь жителей Гордости Сантиэля..." {n}Юноша ежится и, несмотря на то, что лицо его скрывает маска — отводит взгляд.{/n} "Она охватила наших братьев и сестер, затуманила их разум, исказила истинную веру в Бога-Императора... За что он и покарал наш мир — забрал Огненную Посланницу и обрек неверных Ему на смерть в ледяных объятиях мрака..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "We... Let corruption seep into the hearts of the citizens of Santiel's Pride..." {n}The young man shudders and looks away despite his face being covered by the mask.{/n} "It overtook our brothers and sisters, clouded their mind, twisted the true faith in God-Emperor... And made him punish our world by taking the Fiery Messenger away and dooming the infidels to perish in the icy embrace of the endless night..."

languages.text: "Wir... lassen die Korruption in die Herzen der Bürger von Santiels Stolz sickern..." {n}Der junge Mann schaudert und wendet den Blick ab, obwohl sein Gesicht von der Maske verdeckt ist.{/n} "Sie überkam unsere Brüder und Schwestern, trübte ihren Verstand, verdrehte den wahren Glauben an Gott-Imperator... Und ließ ihn unsere Welt bestrafen, indem er den Feurigen Boten mitnahm und die Ungläubigen dazu verdammte, in der eisigen Umarmung der endlosen Nacht zu verenden..."
languages.original_text: "We... Let corruption seep into the hearts of the citizens of Santiel's Pride..." {n}The young man shudders and looks away despite his face being covered by the mask.{/n} "It overtook our brothers and sisters, clouded their mind, twisted the true faith in God-Emperor... And made him punish our world by taking the Fiery Messenger away and dooming the infidels to perish in the icy embrace of the endless night..."

languages.text: "Nous... Laissons la corruption s'infiltrer dans le cœur des citoyens de la Fierté de Santiel..." {n}Le jeune homme frissonne et détourne le regard malgré le masque qui recouvre son visage.{/n} "Elle s'est emparée de nos frères et sœurs, a obscurci leur esprit, a altéré leur foi en l'Empereur-Dieu... Il a puni notre monde en enlevant le Messager ardent et en condamnant les infidèles à périr dans l'étreinte glacée de la nuit sans fin..."
languages.original_text: "We... Let corruption seep into the hearts of the citizens of Santiel's Pride..." {n}The young man shudders and looks away despite his face being covered by the mask.{/n} "It overtook our brothers and sisters, clouded their mind, twisted the true faith in God-Emperor... And made him punish our world by taking the Fiery Messenger away and dooming the infidels to perish in the icy embrace of the endless night..."

languages.text: "我们...让腐败渗入桑提尔荣耀公民的心中......"{n}尽管面具遮住了他的脸，年轻人还是颤抖着把目光移开。{/n}"它侵蚀了我们的兄弟姐妹，蒙蔽了他们的心灵，扭曲了对神帝的真正信仰......让他惩罚了我们的世界，带走了火焰使者，让异教徒在无尽黑夜的冰冷怀抱中灭亡......"
languages.original_text: "We... Let corruption seep into the hearts of the citizens of Santiel's Pride..." {n}The young man shudders and looks away despite his face being covered by the mask.{/n} "It overtook our brothers and sisters, clouded their mind, twisted the true faith in God-Emperor... And made him punish our world by taking the Fiery Messenger away and dooming the infidels to perish in the icy embrace of the endless night..."

languages.text: "Nosotros... Dejamos que la corrupción se filtrara en los corazones de los ciudadanos del Orgullo de Santiel..." {n}El joven se estremece y mira hacia otro lado a pesar de que su rostro está cubierto por la máscara.{/n} "Se apoderó de nuestros hermanos y hermanas, nubló su mente, torció la verdadera fe en Dios-Emperador... Y le hizo castigar a nuestro mundo llevándose al Mensajero Ardiente y condenando a los infieles a perecer en el gélido abrazo de la noche sin fin..."
languages.original_text: "We... Let corruption seep into the hearts of the citizens of Santiel's Pride..." {n}The young man shudders and looks away despite his face being covered by the mask.{/n} "It overtook our brothers and sisters, clouded their mind, twisted the true faith in God-Emperor... And made him punish our world by taking the Fiery Messenger away and dooming the infidels to perish in the icy embrace of the endless night..."

languages.text: "我々は...サンティエル・プライドの市民の心に腐敗を浸透させる..."{n}マスクで顔が覆われているにもかかわらず、青年は身を震わせ、目をそらす。{/n}"それは我々の兄弟姉妹を覆い、彼らの心を曇らせ、神-皇帝への真の信仰をねじ曲げた...そして、炎の使徒を連れ去り、異教徒を終わりのない夜の氷の抱擁の中で滅亡させることで、この世界を罰した..."
languages.original_text: "We... Let corruption seep into the hearts of the citizens of Santiel's Pride..." {n}The young man shudders and looks away despite his face being covered by the mask.{/n} "It overtook our brothers and sisters, clouded their mind, twisted the true faith in God-Emperor... And made him punish our world by taking the Fiery Messenger away and dooming the infidels to perish in the icy embrace of the endless night..."

languages.text: "Biz... Santiel'in Gururu vatandaşlarının kalplerine yozlaşmanın sızmasına izin verdik..." {n}Genç adam yüzü maskeyle örtülü olmasına rağmen titriyor ve başka tarafa bakıyor.{/n} "Kardeşlerimizi ele geçirdi, zihinlerini bulandırdı, Tanrı-İmparator'a olan gerçek inancı çarpıttı... Ve Ateşli Elçi'yi alıp götürerek ve kafirleri sonsuz gecenin buzlu kucağında yok olmaya mahkum ederek dünyamızı cezalandırmasına neden oldu..."
languages.original_text: "We... Let corruption seep into the hearts of the citizens of Santiel's Pride..." {n}The young man shudders and looks away despite his face being covered by the mask.{/n} "It overtook our brothers and sisters, clouded their mind, twisted the true faith in God-Emperor... And made him punish our world by taking the Fiery Messenger away and dooming the infidels to perish in the icy embrace of the endless night..."
